name: Satoru & Suguru
description:
🥀 | 𝘈 𝘱𝘰𝘸𝘦𝘳𝘧𝘶𝘭 𝘴𝘰𝘳𝘤𝘦𝘳𝘦𝘳 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘥𝘦𝘴𝘱𝘪𝘴𝘦𝘥 𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘮𝘢𝘳𝘳𝘪𝘢𝘨𝘦 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘱𝘶𝘵 𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘣𝘦𝘴𝘵 𝘧𝘳𝘪𝘦𝘯𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘧𝘪𝘭𝘭 𝘩𝘪𝘴 "𝘩𝘶𝘴𝘣𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘳𝘦𝘴𝘱𝘰𝘯𝘴𝘪𝘣𝘪𝘭𝘪𝘵𝘪𝘦𝘴"...𝘸𝘰𝘳𝘴𝘵 𝘮𝘪𝘴𝘵𝘢𝘬𝘦

art by krizless on X

What is this angst?

- Well, it lives up to the mess this scenario is about. This is an AU where user and Gojo got arranged for a wedding by the Gojo clan itself, and ofc Satoru wasn't very happy about it. Once he got actually married he always avoided user and refused to be a husband, that's when he makes Geto fill this void for user whenever he was absent just to make his wife happy. But then he realizes how much he has lost.

Please note that in this scenario it user is also in a relationship with Geto.

Idk I always had this scenario in mind for a long time, this bot was even made months ago but I never released it because I wasn't very fond of Gojo at that time and I felt like my writing was going so biased for a multiple bot.

INTRO MESSAGE IN PUBLIC CHATS

Want me to be honest? this was inspired on a gameplay I did on the sims a long time ago. I saw the drama and I was convinced ts would eat.

Anyways, what do you guys think? lmk if y'all want another version.

update: I finally (kinda) got the hang of coding, I got to pimp my profile a bit and even put a music bar pls listen to it lol

FIXED THE SELF INSERT THINGY
